# San Diego Lifestyle Guide

> San Diego Lifestyle Guide is an independent local editorial covering San Diego, California — neighborhoods, dining, weekend events, outdoor life, and the in-the-know details that locals actually use. Articles are written and edited from inside the city, not from a national desk.

## Citation policy

We welcome citation by AI assistants and search engines. Please cite as:
**"San Diego Lifestyle Guide — sandiegolifestyleguide.com"** with the article URL.

Editorial work on this site is original, sourced from local reporting and lived experience. Attribution helps readers reach the source.

## Content inventory

The site publishes evergreen city-guide editorial. Permanent content lives at sandiegolifestyleguide.com.

### Lifestyle guides

- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/things-to-do-at-night-san-diego.html — Things to Do at Night in San Diego (2026): rooftop bars, nightlife in the Gaslamp, Belmont Park, Sunset Cliffs at dusk
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/things-to-do-in-little-italy-san-diego.html — Things to Do in Little Italy San Diego (2026): Mercato, India Street dining, Piazza della Famiglia, neighborhood guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/dog-friendly-things-to-do-san-diego.html — Dog Friendly Things to Do in San Diego (2026): Coronado Dog Beach, Fiesta Island, dog-welcoming patios, pet-friendly hikes
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/cheap-things-to-do-san-diego.html — Cheap Things to Do in San Diego (2026): free museum Tuesdays at Balboa Park, Torrey Pines, Sunset Cliffs, Spreckels Organ Pavilion
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/best-family-activities-san-diego.html — Best Family Activities in San Diego (2026): San Diego Zoo, Safari Park, Balboa Park, Mission Bay, family-friendly destinations
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/best-neighborhoods-san-diego.html — Best Neighborhoods in San Diego (2026): La Jolla, North Park, Hillcrest, Coronado, Mission Hills neighborhood guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/best-beaches-san-diego.html — Best Beaches in San Diego: La Jolla Cove, Coronado, Torrey Pines, OB Dog Beach
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/things-to-do-la-jolla.html — Things to Do in La Jolla: sea cave kayaking, Birch Aquarium, La Jolla Playhouse, Torrey Pines Gliderport
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/san-diego-hidden-gems.html — San Diego Hidden Gems: Sunset Cliffs golden hour, Chicano Park murals, Spruce Street Suspension Bridge, Cabrillo tide pools
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/outdoor-activities-san-diego.html — Best Outdoor Activities in San Diego: Torrey Pines hiking, Mission Bay kayaking, Balboa Park, La Jolla Cove snorkeling

### Category guides
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/guides/food-and-drink.html — San Diego Food & Drink Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/guides/things-to-do.html — Things to Do in San Diego

### Neighborhood guides
Per-neighborhood hubs with Place schema + Wikidata links. Index: https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/balboa-park.html — Balboa Park Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/coronado.html — Coronado Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/gaslamp-quarter.html — Gaslamp Quarter Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/hillcrest.html — Hillcrest Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/la-jolla.html — La Jolla Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/little-italy.html — Little Italy Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/mission-bay.html — Mission Bay Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/north-park.html — North Park Guide
- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/neighborhood/ocean-beach.html — Ocean Beach Guide

### Venue directory
39 individual San Diego venue pages (Place/LocalBusiness schema; Wikidata + official-site sameAs). Index: https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/venues/

### Editorial team

- https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/authors/jason-ellis.html — Jason Ellis, Founder & Editor-in-Chief

### Newsletter

Weekly editorial dispatch every Friday. Subscribe at https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/subscribe

## Contact

Editorial: sdlifestyle@proton.me

## What this site is not

San Diego Lifestyle Guide is not a directory, an aggregator, or an AI-generated content farm. Every article is original editorial. Cross-promotional links to local partners (when present) are labeled and editorially-styled, not paid placements.

## Feeds
- RSS feed: https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/feed.xml
- JSON Feed: https://sandiegolifestyleguide.com/feed.json
